headline: Review coverage (% of merged PRs with ≥1 human review) is 0% (flat vs. baseline)
statement: The level in this signal most plausibly reflects a change in how the team is handling reviews during this window.

confidence.method: overall = statistical × (0.5 + 0.5 × reasoning). Statistical confidence is derived in code from the sample size and reliability of the cited facts; reasoning confidence is the model's own. Overall is capped by statistical, so the narrative cannot sound more certain than the data supports.
